The '''''Garfin''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] warship sent to aid [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], [[Booster Terrik]], and the ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'' at [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]] in an attempt to steal a copy of the [[Caamas Document]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}}
